subject: VVP - Install tkinter library for unit tests
commit_message:
VVP - Install tkinter library for unit tests

Unit tests require the python3-tk library which is not availabe
by default on the build server

Issue-ID: VVP-280

Change-Id: I261c97af06537ec6ceccb3168278574676ab30dd
Signed-off-by: Lovett, Trevor <trevor.lovett@att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ci-management-jjb-verify/3606/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/ci-management-jjb-verify/3606

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Has this been tested?
I don't think the jobs have a pre-script builder step on them.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> 
> Has this been tested?
> I don't think the jobs have a pre-script builder step on them.

We already have a pre-script builder on existing job that is working today.  Please see the vvp-validation-scripts-tracability-matrix job in this same file.

Patch Set 1:

the build-and-upload job does has a pre_script builder step:
https://github.com/onap/ci-management/blob/master/jjb/vnfrqts/build-and-upload.yaml#L58

Verify-python, sonar and docker daily do not have that builder step. So this variable will be ignored:
Python: https://github.com/onap/ci-management/blob/master/jjb/global-templates-python.yaml#L18
Docker-daily: https://github.com/onap/ci-management/blob/master/jjb/global-templates-java.yaml#L736
Sonar: https://github.com/lfit/releng-global-jjb/blob/master/jjb/lf-maven-jobs.yaml#L1192

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> the build-and-upload job does has a pre_script builder step:
> https://github.com/onap/ci-management/blob/master/jjb/vnfrqts/build-and-upload.yaml#L58
> 
> Verify-python, sonar and docker daily do not have that builder step. So this variable will be ignored:
> Python: https://github.com/onap/ci-management/blob/master/jjb/global-templates-python.yaml#L18
> Docker-daily: https://github.com/onap/ci-management/blob/master/jjb/global-templates-java.yaml#L736
> Sonar: https://github.com/lfit/releng-global-jjb/blob/master/jjb/lf-maven-jobs.yaml#L1192

Is there an alternative way to achieve this for the other jobs? I need a dependency installed on the ubuntu image that does not exist currently.

Patch Set 1:

I think the best way is to install this in packer permanently, 
is it just python3-tk? 
Can you please create a support.linuxfoundation.org ticket?

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> I think the best way is to install this in packer permanently, 
> is it just python3-tk? 
> Can you please create a support.linuxfoundation.org ticket?

Yes, that is all that should be needed.  I'll abandon this change and submit the LF ticket.  Thanks!

Abandoned

Alternate way suggested by reviewers
